description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage define jobs docs, lint, py34, py35, py36, and pypy3 that each run on their specified Docker images (python:latest for docs and lint, python:3.4, python:3.5, python:3.6, and pypy:3) and execute the shared script: apt-get update -qq, apt-get install -y -qq tree, pip install tox, pip install -r requirements/setup.txt, tox, setting the TOXENV variable to docs, lint, py34, py35, py36, or pypy3 respectively; the lint job is allowed to fail. The docs job stores the generated docs/_build/html directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on docs, moves docs/_build/html to a public directory, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only for tags matching the regex /v([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)/. Also add a pypi job that runs on python:latest, installs development requirements with pip install -r requirements/dev.txt, runs make release, and is triggered only for the same version‑tag pattern. All jobs are tagged with docker.
